item.description: Internal/Other Changes - Updated bundled Claude CLI to version 2.1.112
- Updated to parity with Claude Code v2.1.112
- Fixed "claude-opus-4-7 is temporarily unavailable" for auto mode

item.title: Failures to add Credentials to Vaults
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: v1.0.99
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.99

item.title: v2.1.112
item.description: What's changed - Fixed "claude-opus-4-7 is temporarily unavailable" for auto mode

item.title: Claude Cowork not starting for some users
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved in the v1.3109.0 release of Claude Desktop. Please "Check for Updates".

item.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.112
item.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

item.title: v1.0.98
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.98

item.title: v2.1.111
item.description: What's changed - Claude Opus 4.7 xhigh is now available! Use /effort to tune speed vs. intelligence - Auto mode is now available for Max subscribers when using Opus 4.7 - Added xhigh effort level for Opus 4.7, sitting between high and max. Available via /effort, --effort, and the model picker; other

item.title: sdk: v0.90.0
item.description: 0.90.0 (2026-04-16) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.89.0...sdk-v0.90.0 Features api: add claude-opus-4-7, token budgets and userprofiles (b26134b) Chores actually delete release-doctor.yml (0fe984d) ci: remove release-doctor workflow (08e58bd)

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.

item.title: v2.1.94
item.description: What's changed - Added support for Amazon Bedrock powered by Mantle, set CLAUDECODEUSEMANTLE=1 - Changed default effort level from medium to high for API-key, Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry, Team, and Enterprise users (control this with /effort) - Added compact Slacked channel header with a clickable channe

item.title: bedrock-sdk: v0.28.0
item.description: 0.28.0 (2026-04-07) Full Changelog: bedrock-sdk-v0.27.0...bedrock-sdk-v0.28.0 Features client: Create Bedrock Mantle client (810) (2f1f4a1)

item.title: v2.1.92
item.description: What's changed - Added forceRemoteSettingsRefresh policy setting: when set, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails (fail-closed) - Added interactive Bedrock setup wizard accessible from the login screen when selecting "3rd-party platfor

item.title: vertex-sdk: v0.15.0
item.description: 0.15.0 (2026-04-03) Full Changelog: vertex-sdk-v0.14.4...vertex-sdk-v0.15.0 Features vertex: add support for US multi-region endpoint (5e5aea7) vertex: add support for US multi-region endpoint (0de0e98)

item.title: sdk: v0.83.0
item.description: 0.83.0 (2026-04-03) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.82.0...sdk-v0.83.0 Features vertex: add support for US multi-region endpoint (5e5aea7) vertex: add support for US multi-region endpoint (0de0e98) Chores client: deprecate client-side compaction helpers (1926e87) client: internal updates (3d64763)

item.title: v1.0.87
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.87

item.title: v2.1.91
item.description: What's changed - Added MCP tool result persistence override via meta["anthropic/maxResultSizeChars"] annotation (up to 500K), allowing larger results like DB schemas to pass through without truncation - Added disableSkillShellExecution setting to disable inline shell execution in skills, custom slas

item.title: v1.0.86
item.description: What's Changed Fix subprocess isolation install step not running by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1148 Pass env to execFileSync git calls by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1151 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthr

item.title: v1.0.85
item.description: What's Changed fix: fall back to repo defaultbranch instead of hardcoded "main" by @ashwin-ant in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1143 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.85

item.title: v2.1.90
item.description: What's changed - Added /powerup — interactive lessons teaching Claude Code features with animated demos - Added CLAUDECODEPLUGINKEEPMARKETPLACEONFAILURE env var to keep the existing marketplace cache when git pull fails, useful in offline environments - Added .husky to protected directories (acceptE

item.title: aws-sdk: v0.2.0
item.description: 0.2.0 (2026-04-01) Full Changelog: aws-sdk-v0.1.0...aws-sdk-v0.2.0 Features prepare aws package (782) (f351d4d) Chores internal: version bump (eb97e85) internal: version bump (8ebaf61)

item.description: 0.27.0 (2026-04-01) Full Changelog: bedrock-sdk-v0.26.4...bedrock-sdk-v0.27.0 Features support API keys in Bedrock SDK (824) (be6c608)

item.title: sdk: v0.82.0
item.description: 0.82.0 (2026-04-01) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.81.0...sdk-v0.82.0 Features api: add structured stopdetails to message responses (031328a) prepare aws package (782) (f351d4d) support API keys in Bedrock SDK (824) (be6c608) Chores tests: bump steady to v0.20.2 (6cf12cc)

item.title: v1.0.84
item.description: What's Changed Pin Claude Code to 2.1.87 by @ashwin-ant in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1142 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.84

item.title: v1.0.83
item.description: What's Changed Add subprocess isolation setup and git credential helper by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1132 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.83

item.title: v2.1.89
item.description: What's changed - Added "defer" permission decision to PreToolUse hooks — headless sessions can pause at a tool call and resume with -p --resume to have the hook re-evaluate - Added CLAUDECODENOFLICKER=1 environment variable to opt into flicker-free alt-screen rendering with virtualized scrollback -

item.title: sdk: v0.81.0
item.description: 0.81.0 (2026-03-31) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.80.0...sdk-v0.81.0 Features add .type field to APIError for error kind identification (790) (4bf637d) Bug Fixes memory: append path separator in validatePath prefix check (0ac69b3) Chores ci: run builds on CI even if only spec metadata changed (70b657

item.title: v1.0.82
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.82

item.title: v2.1.87
item.description: What's changed - Fixed messages in Cowork Dispatch not getting delivered

item.title: v1.0.81
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.81

item.title: v2.1.86
item.description: What's changed - Added X-Claude-Code-Session-Id header to API requests so proxies can aggregate requests by session without parsing the body - Added .jj and .sl to VCS directory exclusion lists so Grep and file autocomplete don't descend into Jujutsu or Sapling metadata - Fixed --resume failing with

item.title: v1.0.80
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.80

item.title: v2.1.85
item.description: What's changed - Added CLAUDECODEMCPSERVERNAME and CLAUDECODEMCPSERVERURL environment variables to MCP headersHelper scripts, allowing one helper to serve multiple servers - Added conditional if field for hooks using permission rule syntax (e.g., Bash(git )) to filter when they run, reducing process

item.title: v1.0.79
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.79

item.title: v2.1.84
item.description: What's changed - Added PowerShell tool for Windows as an opt-in preview. Learn more at https://code.claude.com/docs/en/tools-referencepowershell-tool - Added ANTHROPICDEFAULT{OPUS,SONNET,HAIKU}MODELSUPPORTS env vars to override effort/thinking capability detection for pinned default models for 3p (B

item.title: v1.0.78
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.78

item.title: v2.1.83
item.description: What's changed - Added managed-settings.d/ drop-in directory alongside managed-settings.json, letting separate teams deploy independent policy fragments that merge alphabetically - Added CwdChanged and FileChanged hook events for reactive environment management (e.g., direnv) - Added sandbox.failIfU

item.title: v1.0.77
item.description: Subprocess environment scrubbing for untrusted-input workflows Workflows that configure allowednonwriteusers now automatically get CLAUDECODESUBPROCESSENVSCRUB=1, which makes Claude Code (v2.1.79+) strip Anthropic and cloud provider credentials from the environment of subprocesses it spawns (Bash to

item.title: v1.0.76
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.76

item.title: v2.1.81
item.description: What's changed - Added --bare flag for scripted -p calls — skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks; requires ANTHROPICAPIKEY or an apiKeyHelper via --settings (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled - Added --channels permission relay — channel servers that de

item.title: v2.1.80
item.description: What's changed - Added ratelimits field to statusline scripts for displaying Claude.ai rate limit usage (5-hour and 7-day windows with usedpercentage and resetsat) - Added source: 'settings' plugin marketplace source — declare plugin entries inline in settings.json - Added CLI tool usage detection t

item.title: v1.0.75
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.75

item.title: v2.1.79
item.description: What's changed - Added --console flag to claude auth login for Anthropic Console (API billing) authentication - Added "Show turn duration" toggle to the /config menu - Fixed claude -p hanging when spawned as a subprocess without explicit stdin (e.g. Python subprocess.run) - Fixed Ctrl+C not working

item.title: sdk: v0.80.0
item.description: 0.80.0 (2026-03-18) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.79.0...sdk-v0.80.0 Features api: manual updates (dd12f1a) api: manual updates (9c0a077) Chores internal: tweak CI branches (4a5819e)

item.title: v1.0.74
item.description: What's Changed Restore .claude/ and .mcp.json from PR base branch before CLI runs by @km-anthropic in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1066 Remove redundant git status/diff/log from tag mode allowlist by @ddworken in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1075 F

item.title: v1.0.73
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.73

item.title: v2.1.78
item.description: What's changed - Added StopFailure hook event that fires when the turn ends due to an API error (rate limit, auth failure, etc.) - Added ${CLAUDEPLUGINDATA} variable for plugin persistent state that survives plugin updates; /plugin uninstall prompts before deleting it - Added effort, maxTurns, and d

item.title: v2.1.77
item.description: What's changed - Increased default maximum output token limits for Claude Opus 4.6 to 64k tokens, and the upper bound for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 models to 128k tokens - Added allowRead sandbox filesystem setting to re-allow read access within denyRead regions - /copy now accepts an optional index:

item.title: sdk: v0.79.0
item.description: 0.79.0 (2026-03-16) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.78.0...sdk-v0.79.0 Features add support for filesystem memory tools (599) (1064199) api: chore(config): clean up model enum list (31) (07727a6) api: GA thinking-display-setting (4dc8df4) tests: update mock server (e5c3be9) Bug Fixes docs/contributing

item.title: v1.0.72
item.description: What's Changed Harden tag mode tool permissions against prompt injection by @km-anthropic in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1002 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.72

item.title: v2.1.76
item.description: What's changed - Added MCP elicitation support — MCP servers can now request structured input mid-task via an interactive dialog (form fields or browser URL) - Added new Elicitation and ElicitationResult hooks to intercept and override responses before they're sent back - Added -n / --name <name> CL

item.title: v1.0.71
item.description: What's Changed docs: warn that allowedbots can expose the action to external triggers by @an-dustin in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1039 feat(inline-comment): add confirmed param + probe-pattern safety net by @km-anthropic in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-actio

item.description: 0.73.0 (2026-02-05) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.72.1...sdk-v0.73.0 Features api: Release Claude Opus 4.6, adaptive thinking, and other features (f741f92) Bug Fixes client: avoid memory leak in abort signal listener (895) (3bdd153) client: avoid memory leak with abort signals (53e47df) client: avoid

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our most capable generally available model for complex reasoning and agentic coding

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: The best combination of speed and intelligence

item.title: Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: The fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
